title: Junior Investment Banker at National Insurance Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at National Insurance Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with National Insurance Holdings Services! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Surat team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About National Insurance Holdings Services:
National Insurance Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with National Insurance Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
